name: Can I sue my coworker who caused my injury on the job in Saint George?
description: Rarely; comp usually exclusive unless gross negligence.[3]

mainEntity.name: Can I sue my coworker who caused my injury on the job in Saint George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Rarely; comp usually exclusive unless gross negligence.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Generally no, workers comp is exclusive remedy, but possible if gross negligence or third-party fault like defective equipment.[3] Idaho/Utah limit coworker suits.[3] Key factors: Check for non-employer liability; consult lawyer.[3] File comp first for sure benefits.[2] Suits rare but viable for extras.[3]
